title: Strategy Engine and Trade Recommendation Engine
objective: Turn ranked strikes into strategy-aware recommendations with entry, target, stop loss, and confidence metadata.
prd_mapping: Section 2: Strategy Engine, Trade Recommendation Engine
scope: Strategy rule evaluation using ranked strikes.
Recommendation generation per user strategy subscription.
Explainability payload for why a strike was recommended.
deliverables: Strategy execution policy model (entry windows, risk profile, segment scope).
Recommendation engine with status flow (GENERATED, ACCEPTED, EXPIRED).
API endpoints for latest and historical recommendations.
success_metrics: Recommendation generated within 1 second of ranking output.
Recommendation has valid entry/target/sl and strategy reference.
No duplicate recommendation per strategy per cycle.
open_questions: Can multiple strategies recommend the same strike for same user?
